author: Red Cogs
install_msg: Thanks for installing ScheduledMessage! Use `[p]schedule` or `[p]sm` to get started. Example: `[p]sm #general 0200 Hey Early Birds!` — supports recurring messages, embeds, and role pings!
name: ScheduledMessage
short: Schedule messages to be sent later
description: Schedule one-time or recurring messages to be sent in specific channels at specific times. Supports embeds, role pings, multiple time formats, and persistent storage.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores scheduled message content, target channel IDs, and author IDs for the purpose of delivering messages at the requested time. No personal data is shared with third parties.
